bird.summary: The Hainan leaf warbler or Hainan leaf-warbler (Phylloscopus hainanus) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Phylloscopidae. It i…

locations.name: 海南省
locations.summary: 海南省，简称琼，是中华人民共和国唯一全境位于热带的省份，省会位于海口市。海南省是一个以海洋为主体的岛屿省份，亦是中华人民共和国总面积和海洋面积最大的省份。全省户籍总人口约1048.31万人，不过每年冬季会有大量候鸟型流动人口（進出约972…

locations.name: 平均海拔
locations.summary: 平均海拔（英語：Above mean sea level，缩写：AMSL）又称为海拔高度，是指以平均海平面高度作为高程基准面起测定的地面或空中高度，对地理测量，飞行控制，电台设定，气象研究都有决定性作用。 所谓平均海平面高度实际是并不存在…

relations.subject: 海南柳莺
relations.evidence: It is endemic to mountains of southern Hainan Island, China. Hainan leaf warbler inhabits primary, selectively logged, and secondary forest as well as scrub at elevations of above sea level

relations.evidence: Moreover, it is threatened by habitat loss and fragmentation
